name: op_partial_repaint_text
description:
PARTIAL REPAINT (text change): editing ONE text node must repaint just that node, bounded. The

at node 10 uses "Azul Mock Mono" (10px/glyph at 20px) so the glyph geometry is deterministic. reset_frame_counters + snapshot_frame baseline; set_node_text changes 'before' → 'AFTER'; get_frame_report feeds the asserts. assert_changed proves the pixels really differ, assert_damage_covers_changes proves the damage set contains every changed pixel, assert_work_bounded caps the work so a one-word edit cannot trigger a full rebuild. DOM mirrors e2e/bug-dom-mutation-no-damage.json so node id 10 is a stable

.

css: #t    { font-family: "Azul Mock Mono"; font-size: 20px; color: black; }
